title: Icy Intense Ukrainian Clams Bisque
description: A pungent and refreshing Ukrainian dish featuring clams, yuzu cure, and a sugar free friendly twist, perfect for kids and adults alike.
instructions: Rinse the clams under cold water and set them aside.
In a large pot, melt the butter over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the chicken broth, yuzu juice, and dried dill to the pot.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
Add the clams to the pot and cook until they are open and tender.
Remove the pot from the heat and stir in the heavy cream.
Season the bisque with salt and black pepper to taste.
Strain the bisque through a fine mesh sieve into a large bowl.
Chill the bisque in the refrigerator until it is cold and glassy.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
